description: This file defines the ChatSendFlow class, which orchestrates chat message handling, including persisting user messages, invoking a model provider, executing tool calls, persisting assistant and tool messages, and returning structured responses.

classes.name: ChatSendFlow
classes.description: A class responsible for managing the flow of chat interactions, including message persistence, model invocation, tool execution, and response management.

methods.name: constructor({ store, toolRegistry, confirmationService, log, config })
methods.description: Initializes a new instance of ChatSendFlow with dependencies such as store, toolRegistry, confirmationService, log, and config.

methods.name: _loadSessionOrThrow(sessionId)
methods.description: Loads a chat session by sessionId or throws NotFoundError if the session does not exist.

methods.name: run({ sessionId, content, providerConfigId = null, apiKey = null })
methods.description: Executes a single user-to-assistant turn by persisting user message, invoking the model provider, handling tool calls, persisting assistant and tool responses, and returning the structured result.

ctags.name: constructor
ctags.pattern: /^  constructor({ store, toolRegistry, confirmationService, log, config }) {$/

ctags.name: run
ctags.pattern: /^  async run({ sessionId, content, providerConfigId = null, apiKey = null }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ sessionId, content, providerConfigId = null, apiKey = null })
